tasks.title: Add DestinationFaqIdSchema to common/id.schema.ts
tasks.description: In packages/schemas/src/common/id.schema.ts add DestinationFaqIdSchema mirroring AccommodationFaqIdSchema. Acceptance: schema exported, typechecks, follows the same UUID-branded pattern.

tasks.title: Create destination.faq.schema.ts subtype
tasks.description: Create packages/schemas/src/entities/destination/subtypes/destination.faq.schema.ts mirroring accommodation.faq.schema.ts: DestinationFaqSchema = BaseFaqSchema.extend({ id: DestinationFaqIdSchema, destinationId: DestinationIdSchema }); Add/Update/Remove/List input schemas; single/list output schemas. Update/Remove defined for Phase 2 reuse but not wired now. Acceptance: file typechecks, all schemas exported.

tasks.title: Raise description max to 8000 + add faqs array to DestinationSchema + re-exports
tasks.description: In packages/schemas/src/entities/destination/destination.schema.ts: change description .max(2000) to .max(8000) (line 58); add `faqs: z.array(BaseFaqSchema).optional()` after rating (line 82). Re-export new subtype from entities/destination/index.ts. Both changes are additive/relaxing (safe per schema-compat policy). Acceptance: typechecks, faqs optional on Destination type.

tasks.title: Schema unit tests + historic compat fixture
tasks.description: Add tests in packages/schemas: DestinationFaqSchema valid/invalid (question<10 rejected, answer 2000 boundary); description 8000 boundary valid, 8001 rejected. Add a historic destination fixture (pre-faqs) under test/fixtures/historic/ and a .compat.test.ts asserting it still safeParses. Acceptance: all tests pass.

tasks.title: Create destination_faq.dbschema.ts table + child relation
tasks.description: Create packages/db/src/schemas/destination/destination_faq.dbschema.ts: table destination_faqs mirroring accommodation_faqs (id uuid PK, destination_id uuid NOT NULL FK -> destinations.id ON DELETE CASCADE, question/answer text NOT NULL, category text NULL, lifecycle_state enum default ACTIVE, admin_info jsonb $type<AdminInfoType>, audit cols, deleted_at). Indexes: destinationFaqs_destinationId_idx, destinationFaqs_category_idx. destinationFaqsRelations one(destinations). Acceptance: typechecks.

tasks.title: Add faqs: many() to destination relations + schemas index export
tasks.description: In packages/db/src/schemas/destination/destination.dbschema.ts add `faqs: many(destinationFaqs)` to the destinations relations. Export the new dbschema from the schemas index. Acceptance: typechecks, relation resolvable.

tasks.title: Create destinationFaq.model.ts
tasks.description: Create packages/db/src/models/destination/destinationFaq.model.ts extending BaseModel for destination_faqs, mirroring accommodationFaq.model.ts. Export from models index. Acceptance: typechecks, model instantiable.

tasks.title: Push schema locally + verify set_updated_at trigger covers destination_faqs
tasks.description: Run pnpm db:push then pnpm db:apply-extras against the LOCAL dev DB only (never staging/prod). Verify the set_updated_at trigger applies to destination_faqs; if manual/0019 enumerates tables explicitly, add destination_faqs and re-apply. Acceptance: table exists locally, updated_at auto-updates on row update.

tasks.title: Implement DestinationService.addFaq
tasks.description: Add addFaq(actor, { destinationId, faq }) to DestinationService in @repo/service-core, mirroring AccommodationService.addFaq. Insert via destinationFaq model. Permission check via PermissionEnum only. Return Result<T>. Acceptance: typechecks, returns created faq.

tasks.title: Implement DestinationService.getFaqs
tasks.description: Add getFaqs(actor, { destinationId }) to DestinationService returning the list of FAQs for a destination (ordered deterministically; empty array when none). Acceptance: typechecks, returns ordered list.

tasks.title: Unit tests for addFaq/getFaqs
tasks.description: Add service-core unit tests: addFaq success, not-found destination, permission denied; getFaqs returns ordered list and empty array. Mirror accommodation faq service tests. Acceptance: all pass, >=90% coverage on new service code.

tasks.title: Include faqs in public destination detail routes
tasks.description: In apps/api/src/routes/destination/public/ (getByPath + getBySlug) fetch faqs in parallel via service.getFaqs and attach to the detail response, mirroring accommodation/public/getBySlug.ts. faqs: [] when none. Acceptance: typechecks, response includes faqs.

tasks.title: API integration tests for destination faqs
tasks.description: Add apps/api integration tests for public destination detail: success includes faqs, destination without faqs returns faqs: [], nonexistent destination returns 404. Mirror accommodation get-faq test patterns (GET public only in Phase 1). Acceptance: all pass.

tasks.title: Create DestinationFaqAccordion.astro
tasks.description: Create apps/web/src/components/destination/DestinationFaqAccordion.astro mirroring accommodation/FaqAccordion.astro: native details/summary, zero JS, grouped by category. Renders nothing when no FAQs. Acceptance: component renders grouped FAQs.

tasks.title: Map faqs in web transforms
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/lib/api/transforms.ts map the faqs array on the destination detail transform, mirroring the accommodation transform (~lines 563 + 683-688). Acceptance: transformed destination carries faqs.

subtasks.title: Add faqs mapping to destination transform

tasks.title: Wire accordion + FAQPageJsonLd + replace placeholder
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/destinos/[...path].astro: render DestinationFaqAccordion when FAQs exist, wire the generic FAQPageJsonLd.astro (sections {heading, body} from FAQs), and replace DestinationFaqPlaceholder.astro. No JSON-LD when zero FAQs. Acceptance: page renders accordion + emits valid FAQPage JSON-LD with N questions.

tasks.title: Add faqs loop (with category) to destination seed factory
tasks.description: In the destination seed factory (packages/seed/src/example/destinations.seed.ts or equivalent) add a faqs loop calling service.addFaq, mirroring accommodations.seed.ts lines 214-259 BUT passing category through (accommodation omits it). JSON shape: faqs:[{question,answer,category}]. Idempotent (handle ALREADY_EXISTS). Acceptance: seeding a destination with faqs inserts them with categories.

tasks.title: Create seed-content validation test harness for 22 destinations
tasks.description: Add a packages/seed test asserting each of the 22 CITY destination JSON files: parses against DestinationSchema; description length 2000-3500 (allow shorter for genuinely small towns, never >8000); faqs count 5-7; baseline categories present (Cómo llegar, Qué hacer, Cuándo visitar, Servicios); FAQ question/answer within schema bounds. The harness is RED until content lands; each content task turns its city green. Acceptance: harness runs, lists per-city pass/fail.

NO invented data; cite sources in task notes.

tasks.title: Full seed run + 22-destination validation + coverage
tasks.description: Run the T-018 harness green for all 22 cities; run pnpm db:fresh-dev locally to confirm FAQs seed end-to-end with categories; run typecheck + lint + test across affected packages; verify >=90% coverage on new code. Acceptance: all green, all 22 cities pass the harness.
